metadata.name: Housing Damage Leads to Billing Charge

description: After a student moves out of a dorm, the housing staff finds damage to the room, which results in a charge being placed on the student's account.

nodes.task_description: The RA completes a room condition report upon move-out and documents damages.

expected_outcome.expected: RA logs a broken window in the housing system.

nodes.task_description: The housing office assesses a repair fee based on the documented damage.

expected_outcome.expected: Housing office determines a $150 repair fee.

nodes.task_description: The housing office posts the damage charge to the student's account in the university's main billing system.

expected_outcome.expected: A $150 charge is successfully added to the student's tuition bill.
